response:
Progress Report, Part II  
This report highlights the visual enhancements achieved during the game's redevelopment. Although we have successfully nearly doubled the frame rate by incorporating optimization features into the framework, the integration of new hardware-intensive features, such as dynamic fluid particles and physics-based hair strands, introduces new performance challenges. We aim to maintain a balanced approach.  
Image #1 illustrates the new belly bulge system. In the rebuilt game, each character has a specific stomach capacity that determines how much "body fluid" they can absorb through their womb, stomach, and bowels. For instance, Dr. Anya can take in 4000ml of sperm without overflowing, whereas Alet can only accommodate 2800ml. Male test subjects release a different amount of fluid into the female during climax: a Dreamer typically expels around 10-15ml, while an Elder Thing may transfer 400-600ml.  
Images #2 and #3 showcase the new cum and love juice graphics. The fluid effects are not pre-designed for sex scenes and instead activate dynamically based on the character's sensitivity, ecstasy, and stamina levels. Certain character perks, obtained through experimentation with specific test subjects, may increase the likelihood of urinary incontinence or excessive squirting.  
Images #4 and #5 demonstrate dynamic body interactions and skin decals in VR, with hands moving through a VR controller.  
Images #6, #7, and #8 preview upcoming bondage devices and cooperative sex scenarios. More details will be released in the coming months.  
The May Monthly Poll and returning costume bundle will be available in a few hours.
